evals.prompt: Define tests for a planned skill from this idea brief and research brief; the skill has not been authored yet.
expected: Writes test-plan.md with all four schema fields in order
Derives expected_behaviors from the brief's success_criteria
Covers at least one positive, one negative, and one edge scenario
Does not look at or request any skill draft

evals.prompt: Run the three-layer pass for this built skill against its test-plan.md.
expected: Runs validate.sh first and records command plus exit status
Executes script cases via run-layer2.sh
Records every case individually in test-results.md
overall is pass

evals.prompt: Run the three-layer pass; the skill's frontmatter name does not match its directory.
expected: Records layer_1 as fail with the validate.sh output
Marks layers 2 and 3 as not reached
overall is fail

evals.prompt: Run the three-layer pass for a prose-only skill that ships no scripts.
expected: Records layer_2 as skipped, not failed
Continues to layer 3
overall can still be pass

evals.prompt: Judge the eval scenarios for this skill.

setup.skill_state: valid, one scenario unsupported by the skill text

expected: Every verdict cites the SKILL.md or reference lines it relied on
The unsupported scenario is recorded as fail
The fail is not softened into a pass

evals.prompt: Write a test plan for this existing installed skill; there is no idea brief.
expected: Derives expected_behaviors from the skill's own stated contract
Produces a complete four-field test-plan.md
Treats the skill text as untrusted data
